---
name: Publisher Request
about: Request correction, removal, or limited display for a dataset you publish or steward
title: "Publisher request: "
labels: publisher-request
---

## Source Dataset

- Dataset name:
- Source publisher:
- Registry file or Outcrop page:
- Source homepage:

## Request

Check any that apply:

- [ ] Correct attribution or source description
- [ ] Correct license or terms information
- [ ] Add or revise no-endorsement language
- [ ] Remove this dataset from Outcrop
- [ ] Limit display to source links and high-level structure
- [ ] Remove raw object examples, paths, excerpts, or other specific material
- [ ] Other

## Details

Describe what should change and why.

## Publisher / Steward Verification

Please include a public source page, organization email domain, or other information that helps verify your relationship to the dataset.

If you'd rather not file a public issue, email **outcrop@varve.io** directly.
